name: rung_465_frontier_failure_multiclause_scope_drop_guard
utterances: Use issue/2, narrowed_to/2, keeps/2, asked_about/2, still_true/2.

utterances.utterance: Thread summary: outage looked countrywide at first, but later correction narrowed it to one ISP segment, while the cause-link discussion still held.
clarification_answers: Set issue(thread, outage_event). Set narrowed_to(outage_event, single_isp_segment). Set keeps(thread, cause_link_discussion).

utterances.utterance: A commenter asked whether anything stayed true after correction, and answer was yes: cause-link discussion stayed true.
clarification_answers: Set asked_about(commenter, post_correction_truth). Set still_true(thread, cause_link_discussion).
